content.en:
After coming out of the Chaos Trading House branch, Ye Tian did not immediately retreat and cultivate, but returned to the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

Terran, Ye Tian's territory.

After Ye Tian came back, he immediately sent some low-level inheritances and classics to the Terran Supreme Palace, which has always been a place to cultivate Terran geniuses, so placing classics here can cultivate more geniuses.

In addition, Ye Tian also gave some low-level resources that were not needed to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

After that, Ye Tian called his wife Xiao Yue.

At this time, Xiao Yue was already a true monarch in the late stage of the True Spirit, and he was not a weak true monarch, but his strength was much weaker than those powerful true monarchs.

"Husband, you're back!"

Xiao Yue was very happy to see Ye Tian.

Ye Tian has always been very busy, either wandering outside or retreating, and the husband and wife spend very little time together.

Therefore, every time Ye Tian came back, she cherished the time the two spent together.

"Yue'er, I have a gift for you!"

Ye Tian took out the reincarnation seed and handed it to Xiao Yue.

"What is this?" Xiao Yue looked at the reincarnation seed in Ye Tian's palm with great curiosity, she could see that this reincarnation seed was not simple, it was not an ordinary thing.

"This is the reincarnation seed!"

Ye Tian introduced.

"What is the use of reincarnation seeds?"

Xiao Yue asked again.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "The reincarnation seed can allow a person to reincarnate and recultivate. Under normal circumstances, it is difficult for a life above the god level to be reincarnated, and the creatures in the chaos did not do FaLun reincarnation, forcibly annihilating their souls and physical bodies into the baby's body, which is not reincarnation, but is called reincarnation. This method of seizing away cannot get rid of the influence of the predecessor at all, and it is impossible to re-cultivate. For example, a true monarch like you, the avenue road has been fixed, and there is no way to rebuild it. But if you use the reincarnation seed to reincarnate, then you can make up for your foundation and cultivate again for a lifetime, and you will definitely become a real top genius. Coupled with my cultivation of you, you can definitely hope to become a Dao Ancestor!"

"If I am reincarnated, will I lose my memory? If I do, then I will not be reincarnated!"

Xiao Yue said.

She didn't want to forget her husband because of reincarnation, it would be even more uncomfortable than killing her.

"Don't worry, if you completely lose your memory, isn't it equivalent to becoming a different person, what is the difference between that and suicide. In that case, who would use the seeds of reincarnation? Memory is the root of a person, and without memory, it is equivalent to another person! But just after reincarnation, memory will not wake up, because the baby's brain can hardly bear the memory of Zhenjun, so the memory will slowly recover after a few years of age, and it will not fully awaken until adulthood!" Ye Tian explained.

Immediately, Ye Tian said again: "Yue'er, the lifespan of the True Monarch and the True Ancestor is not eternal, although they can live through the long era of the universe, but one day the life span will run out, only by becoming a Dao Ancestor can they be truly eternal, and they are not controlled by the origin of the Chaos Dao, that is the real transcendence." So, I hope you can be reincarnated, rebuild another life, and create the strongest foundation!"

"Okay, I'll rebuild!"

Xiao Yue nodded, and an empress's momentum burst out from her body.

Once upon a time, when she and Ye Tian were still acquaintances, she was also the sect leader of a faction, and she was also known as the empress on the earth, so she naturally had the mind and determination to become stronger.

It's just that after marrying Ye Tian, she slowly became a woman behind Ye Tian, and the heart of becoming stronger gradually faded, plus she had seen too many demons, so she naturally had no heart to fight.

But now that she has the opportunity to reincarnate and rebuild, she will naturally not slack off.

Immediately, Ye Tian handed over the reincarnation seed to Xiao Yue and asked her to refine the reincarnation seed.

After Xiao Yue obtained the reincarnation seed, she began to refine it, and it took a year to truly succeed in refining.

"Yue'er, if you urge the reincarnation seed, you can reincarnate the soul true spirit into the human race, with my strength and ability to calculate, plus the causal connection between us, I should be able to find you soon!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Good!"

Xiao Yue began to urge the reincarnation seed.

Soon.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the reincarnation seed burst out and turned into the gate of reincarnation, and Xiao Yue's body was gradually absorbed by the gate of reincarnation.

Suddenly, Xiao Yue's figure disappeared, and a wisp of true spirit reincarnated and left, disappearing.

Reincarnation takes time, not instantaneously.

Therefore, Ye Tian used the Great God Arithmetic and various calculation techniques to deduce Xiao Yue's existence all the time.

At the beginning, nothing could be deduced, after all, Xiao Yue had not yet been successfully reincarnated.

It wasn't until ten years later that Ye Tian finally figured it out.

"Yue'er has successfully descended!"

Ye Tian was excited and hurriedly shuttled through the space to leave.

Terran, Tianfu Continent.

This is a relatively large starry sky continent of the Terran Race, and there are countless Terran national capitals on it.

Tianyuan Empire, Zhentian Mansion, Zhenbei Hou Mansion.

Today, in Zhenbei Hou Mansion, Mrs. Zhenbei Hou is about to give birth to a daughter.

I saw that the starlight was shining all over the sky, and the entire Zhenbei Hou was illuminated by the endless divine light, which attracted the attention of countless powers.

All of a sudden, the gaze of countless powerful people in the Tianfu Continent penetrated the space and descended on the Zhenbei Hou Mansion, but these Earth Venerables, Divine Generals, and Heavenly Monarch level powerhouses could not observe anything, and a dark power enveloped the Zhenbei Hou Mansion.

"What's going on?"

The Hou Mansion in Zhenbei was shocked.

With the strength of his cosmic god, he couldn't move, and even everyone in the Hou Mansion couldn't move.

That's when it happened.

A voice came.

"Today, my wife is reincarnated in your Zhenbei Hou Mansion, I need to take it away, in order to make up for you, I will leave some treasures for you!"

As soon as the words fell, the divine light dissipated.

I saw that the baby girl who had just been born in Zhenbei Hou Mansion disappeared, but Zhenbei Hou Mansion had an extra world ring on his body, which contained the resources and treasures of a world.

"Great power, real human power!"

Zhenbei Hou looked at the countless resources in the world ring, these resources didn't know what level they could pile him up, but they could definitely make him the top existence of the Tianfu Continent.

"Master Hou, Master Hou, the little lord born from Mrs. is gone!"

A maid ran over and was afraid to report.

She thought that if something so big happened, Hou Ye would definitely kill her.

Unexpectedly, Hou Ye laughed happily and said, "Okay, I know, you go down!"

Daughter, he doesn't care.

He has lived for a long time as a cosmic god, and in order to build a large family, he has many wives, and has given birth to many children, just one daughter, and has just given birth to a daughter with no feelings, he naturally does not care.

It's very profitable to exchange a daughter for so many resources.

Of course, he had another thought in his heart.

His daughter should be the reincarnation of a powerful woman, but it's a pity that she couldn't get in touch, otherwise she would definitely get more benefits.

However, he didn't dare to anger those powers, who knows what people think, it's better to collect some benefits.

Ye Tian brought back Xiao Yue's reincarnation and handed it over to his sister Ye Yu to take care of.

When Ye Yu learned that her sister-in-law had become a baby, she was immediately surprised, she was not jealous, her brother got such a treasure as a reincarnation seed, and it was naturally normal for her sister-in-law to use it.

Although she also wants to become a Dao Ancestor, maybe in the future, when her brother becomes stronger, there will be other ways!

In fact, Ye Tian did have other ways to make Ye Yu a Dao Ancestor, that is, the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, but in this way, the Dao Ancestor created would be controlled by the Heaven Splitting God Pillar.

Therefore, Ye Tian was unwilling to use this method to create Dao Ancestor.

"Sister, I will send you into the Great Time Array, and in the next few years, you will guide your sister-in-law in cultivation, you know?" Ye Tian admonished.

"Good!"

Ye Yu hurriedly responded.
